content: admin/aggregate-ship-validation.js runs admin/validate-ship-page.sh AND admin/validate-ship-page.js per ship via spawnSync — ~290 pages sequential. Full-fleet runs can hang or exceed practical timeouts in containers; use --line=<slug> for spot checks or fix the aggregator before batch dashboard regen. Baseline JSON at audit-reports/ship-validation-dashboard.json.

verification_meta.rationale: Protected operator anchor — household weight signal.
